summary: Jewelry/gold-silver pricing app with live price display. Currently building auto-refresh feature to pull live gold and silver prices from the IBJA API, with fallback values (Gold 24K at ₹1,70,000/10g, Silver at ₹3,09,000/kg).
architectural_notes: Live price data sourced from IBJA API with periodic auto-refresh; fallback to static values when API unavailable

existing_features.title: Update frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to poll the backend canister actor for live prices using React Query with a 10-second refetch interval (as defined in frontend/src/config/refresh.ts), falling back to the hardcoded values in frontend/src/config/fallback.ts when the backend returns an error or unavailable prices.

Update LiveRatesDashboard.tsx and MetalTicker.tsx to reflect auto-refreshing prices: show a visual indicator (e.g., a pulsing dot or 'Live' badge) when prices are being fetched from the IBJA API, and display the last-updated timestamp so users know when prices were last refreshed.

new_feature_requests.summary: Auto-refresh live gold and silver prices from IBJA API with fallback values (Gold 24K ₹1,70,000/10g, Silver ₹3,09,000/kg)

Update the backend Motoko actor in backend/main.mo to periodically fetch live gold and silver prices from the IBJA rates endpoint using HTTP outcalls on a 10-second recurring timer, exposing a query method that returns the latest fetched prices (or fallback values of Gold 24K ₹1,70,000/10g and Silver ₹3,09,000/kg when the API is unavailable or returns an error).
